description: Per-CLI-backend invocation policy for mChatAIShell dev sessions. Read by AIWizard before calling startDevSession + during session polling to drive autoApprove behavior. When a vendor changes flag names (e.g. Codex adds --sandbox false, Gemini adds --yolo), edit this file and refresh via the tunnel command — no Swift rebuild.

concurrency.description: Shell bridge has a 2-session concurrency cap. 'look-before-leap' = show BackgroundCommandCenterView when pool is full; user decides to cancel stale, cancel all, or wait. Stale thresholds define which sessions are candidates for 'Cancel Stale'. Change cap here, not in Swift.

claude.notes: Shell bridge currently ignores autoApprove in the POST body for Claude — use /approve-all on awaiting_approval. --dangerously-skip-permissions is the CLI-level flag; mChatAIShell controls whether it's added.

codex.notes: Codex uses --sandbox false rather than a permissions flag. mChatAIShell maps `sandbox:false` in the body to the CLI arg.
